Solving A Web3 Industry Problem:
As Web3 metas constantly change and lack sustainability, Redacted accelerates a portfolio of companies across several verticals.
On-Chain Acceleration:
The first Web3 platform decentralizing incubation, using on-chain data and user networks to drive startup growth.
Multi-Meta Platform:
$RDAC, the ecosystem token, powers products across DeFi, payments, AI protocols, Trading, SocialFi, and more.
Network Value:
Redacted is cumulatively powering an ecosystem of 1.3M users, $500M in volume, and backed by Spartan Group, Animoca, and Polygon Ventures.

The Redacted Business Model

Redacted has an equity business model across its
ecosystem that accrues value
to holders and back to
$RDAC.

VALUE
Value is created via diverse products, treasury growth, and $RDAC buybacks and burns, strengthening its sustainability.
EQUITY VALUE ACCRUAL
Equity acquisitions, Redacted Studios’ growth, and reinvested exit proceeds drive continuous value accrual.
